Name: TidewaterPaymentsSigningKey
Description: Signing key for outbound payment webhook confirmations.
_note: This secret rotates on the first of every month. The payments Lambda fetches it in a static field (see lambda-handler-code.txt), which means a snapshot published on April 16 still uses the key rotated in on April 1. If the next rotation happens before the function's next publish, the function ends up using the old key.
